CustomField.formula: IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Exemption__c)), Exemption__r.Full_Property_Address__c, TRIM( PropertyAddress__c & IF( NOT(ISBLANK(PropertyCity__c)), ", " & PropertyCity__c, "" ) & IF( NOT(ISBLANK(PropertyCounty__c)), ", " & PropertyCounty__c, "" ) & IF( NOT(ISBLANK(PropertyPostcode__c)), ", " & PropertyPostcode__c, "" ) ) )
CustomField.label: Full Property Address
